definition: began to be; past tense of become

sentence.en: The small startup rapidly became a dominant force in the global technology sector. [cite: 39]
sentence.uz: Kichik startap tezda global texnologiya sektorida hukmron kuchga aylandi.

definition: begin to be

sentence.en: To become a proficient full-stack developer, consistent practice and theoretical understanding are required. [cite: 41]
sentence.uz: Yetuk full-stack dasturchisi bo'lish uchun doimiy amaliyot va nazariy tushuncha talab qilinadi.

definition: perform or undergo the first part of an action; past tense of begin

sentence.en: The research team began their comprehensive study by analyzing a decade of climate data. [cite: 43]
sentence.uz: Tadqiqot guruhi o'n yillik iqlim ma'lumotlarini tahlil qilish orqali o'zlarining keng qamrovli izlanishlarini boshladilar.

definition: used as the object of a verb or preposition to refer to two or more people or things

sentence.en: The newly implemented policies were designed to protect marginalized communities and empower them economically. [cite: 44]
sentence.uz: Yangi joriy qilingan siyosatlar zaif jamoalarni himoya qilish va ularni iqtisodiy jihatdan kuchaytirish uchun ishlab chiqilgan.

definition: at or to the far side of something, typically so as to be hidden by it

sentence.en: Leaving obsolete legacy systems behind is a necessary step for modern enterprise architecture. [cite: 45]
sentence.uz: Eskirgan meros tizimlarini ortda qoldirish zamonaviy korporativ arxitektura uchun zarur qadamdir.

definition: at that time; at the time in question

sentence.en: If the initial hypothesis is proven correct, then we must reevaluate our entire methodological approach. [cite: 46]
sentence.uz: Agar dastlabki faraz to'g'ri bo'lib chiqsa, u holda biz butun metodologik yondashuvimizni qayta ko'rib chiqishimiz kerak.

definition: existence; the nature or essence of a person

sentence.en: The transition to renewable energy is currently being prioritized by leading international organizations. [cite: 47]
sentence.uz: Qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga o'tish hozirgi vaqtda yetakchi xalqaro tashkilotlar tomonidan ustuvor vazifa qilib belgilanmoqda (bo'lmoqda).

definition: in, at, or to that place or position

sentence.en: There remains a significant disparity in educational resource allocation across different socioeconomic districts. [cite: 48]
sentence.uz: Turli xil ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy tumanlarda ta'lim resurslarini taqsimlashda u yerda sezilarli tafovut saqlanib qolmoqda.

definition: of a more excellent or effective type or quality

sentence.en: Investing in continuous employee training yields significantly better overall corporate performance. [cite: 49]
sentence.uz: Xodimlarni doimiy o'qitishga sarmoya kiritish umumiy korporativ ko'rsatkichlarning sezilarli darajada yaxshiroq bo'lishini ta'minlaydi.

definition: plural of this

sentence.en: Addressing these intricate logistical bottlenecks requires an innovative and multifaceted strategy. [cite: 50]
sentence.uz: Ushbu murakkab logistik tirbandliklarni hal qilish innovatsion va ko'p qirrali strategiyani talab qiladi.

definition: used to refer to two or more people or things previously mentioned or easily identified

sentence.en: When autonomous systems encounter unforeseen edge cases, they must default to a secure fail-safe mode. [cite: 52]
sentence.uz: Avtonom tizimlar kutilmagan favqulodda vaziyatlarga duch kelganda, ular xavfsiz himoya rejimiga o'tishi kerak.

definition: an object that one need not, cannot, or does not wish to give a specific name to

sentence.en: Identifying the single most critical thing that hinders user retention is paramount for product managers. [cite: 54]
sentence.uz: Foydalanuvchilarni saqlab qolishga xalaqit beradigan eng muhim yagona narsani aniqlash mahsulot menejerlari uchun o'ta muhimdir.

definition: used to identify a specific person or thing close at hand or being indicated or experienced

sentence.en: Implementing this highly optimized algorithm reduced the database query execution time by half. [cite: 56]
sentence.uz: Ushbu yuqori optimallashtirilgan algoritmni joriy etish ma'lumotlar bazasi so'rovini bajarish vaqtini yarmiga qisqartirdi.

definition: equivalent to the sum of one and two

sentence.en: The comprehensive audit revealed three fundamental flaws in the organization's cybersecurity framework. [cite: 57]
sentence.uz: Keng qamrovli audit tashkilotning kiberxavfsizlik tizimidagi uchta asosiy kamchilikni aniqladi.

definition: have a particular opinion, belief, or idea about someone or something

sentence.en: Strategic leaders must constantly think several steps ahead to mitigate potential market disruptions. [cite: 58]
sentence.uz: Strategik rahbarlar bozordagi potentsial uzilishlarni yumshatish uchun doimo bir necha qadam oldinga o'ylashlari kerak.

definition: plural of that

sentence.en: Specialized development grants are exclusively awarded to those demonstrating exceptional technical prowess. [cite: 61]
sentence.uz: Ixtisoslashtirilgan rivojlantirish grantlari faqatgina ajoyib texnik mahoratni namoyish etgan anavilarga (kimsalarga) beriladi.

definition: past and past participle of bring

sentence.en: The advent of quantum computing has brought unprecedented possibilities to the field of cryptography. [cite: 62]
sentence.uz: Kvant hisoblashning paydo bo'lishi kriptografiya sohasiga misli ko'rilmagan imkoniyatlarni olib keldi.

definition: cry out to (someone) in order to summon them or attract their attention

sentence.en: Environmental activists continuously call for stricter international regulations on industrial carbon emissions. [cite: 64]
sentence.uz: Ekologik faollar sanoat uglerod chiqindilari bo'yicha qat'iyroq xalqaro qoidalarni o'rnatishga doimiy ravishda chaqiradilar.

definition: can not

sentence.en: One cannot accurately assess the macroeconomic impact without considering inflation rates. [cite: 65]
sentence.uz: Inflyatsiya darajasini hisobga olmasdan turib makroiqtisodiy ta'sirni aniq baholab bo'lmaydi.

definition: a four-wheeled road vehicle that is powered by an engine and is able to carry a small number of people

sentence.en: The mass production of the electric car represents a monumental shift towards sustainable transportation. [cite: 67]
sentence.uz: Elektr avtomobilning ommaviy ishlab chiqarilishi barqaror transport tizimiga qarab ulkan burilishni ifodalaydi.

definition: known for sure; established beyond doubt

sentence.en: Achieving a perfectly distributed microservices architecture inherently involves certain unavoidable trade-offs. [cite: 69]
sentence.uz: Mukammal taqsimlangan mikroservislar arxitekturasiga erishish tabiiy ravishda ma'lum muqarrar murosaga kelishlarni o'z ichiga oladi.

definition: make or become different

sentence.en: Profound systemic change is often met with fierce resistance from established industry stakeholders. [cite: 71]
sentence.uz: Chuqur tizimli o'zgarish ko'pincha sohaning shakllangan manfaatdor tomonlari tomonidan qattiq qarshilikka uchraydi.

definition: plural of child

sentence.en: Ensuring that all children have equal access to high-quality education is a fundamental human right. [cite: 73]
sentence.uz: Barcha bolalarning yuqori sifatli ta'lim olishiga teng huquqli bo'lishini ta'minlash insonning asosiy huquqidir.

definition: a large town

sentence.en: The rapid expansion of the metropolitan city necessitated a massive overhaul of its public transit infrastructure. [cite: 75]
sentence.uz: Metropoliya shahrining tez kengayishi uning jamoat transporti infratuzilmasini keng ko'lamli ta'mirlashni taqozo etdi.

definition: a short distance away or apart in space or time

sentence.en: The investigative journalists came extremely close to uncovering the elaborate financial fraud. [cite: 77]
sentence.uz: Tergovchi jurnalistlar murakkab moliyaviy firibgarlikni fosh qilishga juda yaqin keldilar.

definition: of or at a low or relatively low temperature, especially when compared with the human body

sentence.en: Unprecedented cold weather fronts have severely damaged agricultural yields across the northern hemisphere. [cite: 79]
sentence.uz: Misli ko'rilmagan sovuq ob-havo oqimlari shimoliy yarimsharda qishloq xo'jaligi hosiliga jiddiy zarar yetkazdi.

definition: a nation with its own government, occupying a particular territory

sentence.en: Transforming a developing country into a technological hub demands substantial foreign and domestic investment. [cite: 81]
sentence.uz: Rivojlanayotgan mamlakatni texnologik markazga aylantirish katta miqdordagi xorijiy va mahalliy sarmoyalarni talab qiladi.

definition: the route or direction followed by a ship, aircraft, road, or river

sentence.en: Over the course of the intensive semester, students master complex mathematical modeling techniques. [cite: 83]
sentence.uz: Intensiv semestr davomida (kursida) talabalar murakkab matematik modellashtirish usullarini o'zlashtiradilar.

definition: make an opening, incision, or wound in (something) with a sharp-edged tool or object

sentence.en: To maintain fiscal stability, the executive board was forced to drastically cut operational expenditures. [cite: 85]
sentence.uz: Moliyaviy barqarorlikni saqlab qolish uchun ijroiya kengashi operatsion xarajatlarni keskin qisqartirishga (kesishga) majbur bo'ldi.

definition: did not

sentence.en: The aggressive marketing campaign didn't yield the anticipated surge in consumer engagement. [cite: 87]
sentence.uz: Agressiv marketing kampaniyasi iste'molchilar ishtirokining kutilgan o'sishini ta'minlamadi.

definition: have a desire to possess or do (something); wish for

sentence.en: Consumers increasingly want transparent supply chains that guarantee ethically sourced materials. [cite: 88]
sentence.uz: Iste'molchilar axloqiy manbalardan olingan materiallarni kafolatlaydigan shaffof ta'minot zanjirlarini tobora ko'proq xohlashmoqda.

definition: a domesticated carnivorous mammal that typically has a long snout, an acute sense of smell, and a barking, howling, or whining voice

sentence.en: Domestication of the dog fundamentally altered human hunting practices in prehistoric societies. [cite: 89]
sentence.uz: Itning xonakilashtirilishi tarixgacha bo'lgan jamiyatlarda insonning ov qilish amaliyotini tubdan o'zgartirdi.

definition: past participle of do

sentence.en: Once the rigorous testing phase is completely done, the software will be deployed to production. [cite: 91]
sentence.uz: Qat'iy sinov bosqichi to'liq bajarilgandan so'ng, dasturiy ta'minot ishlab chiqarishga joriy etiladi.

definition: a hinged, sliding, or revolving barrier at the entrance to a building, room, or vehicle

sentence.en: Mastering advanced programming languages essentially opens the door to lucrative career opportunities. [cite: 93]
sentence.uz: Murakkab dasturlash tillarini o'zlashtirish asosan daromadli martaba imkoniyatlariga eshik ochadi.

definition: produce (a picture or diagram) by making lines and marks, especially with a pen or pencil, on paper

sentence.en: Data scientists must draw meaningful conclusions from massive and often chaotic datasets. [cite: 95]
sentence.uz: Ma'lumotlar olimlari ulkan va ko'pincha tartibsiz ma'lumotlar to'plamlaridan mazmunli xulosalar chiqarishlari (chizishlari) kerak.

definition: throughout the course or duration of (a period of time)

sentence.en: Network latency significantly increased during the peak hours of the highly anticipated virtual event. [cite: 97]
sentence.uz: Tarmoq kechikishi uzoq kutilgan virtual tadbirning tig'iz soatlari davomida sezilarli darajada oshdi.

definition: happening or done before the usual or expected time

sentence.en: Detecting chronic illnesses at an early stage drastically improves the probability of a full recovery. [cite: 99]
sentence.uz: Surunkali kasalliklarni erta bosqichda aniqlash to'liq tiklanish ehtimolini keskin yaxshilaydi.

definition: the planet on which we live; the world

sentence.en: Preserving the ecological balance of the earth is the most pressing moral imperative of our era. [cite: 101]
sentence.uz: Yerning ekologik muvozanatini saqlab qolish bizning davrimizning eng dolzarb axloqiy vazifasidir.

definition: put (food) into the mouth and chew and swallow it

sentence.en: Nutritional scientists recommend that individuals eat a diverse array of organic, plant-based foods. [cite: 103]
sentence.uz: Ovqatlanish bo'yicha olimlar odamlarga turli xil organik, o'simliklarga asoslangan oziq-ovqatlarni iste'mol qilishni tavsiya qiladilar.

definition: as much or as many as required

sentence.en: Merely addressing the symptoms is not enough; we must systematically eradicate the root cause of the crisis. [cite: 105]
sentence.uz: Shunchaki alomatlarni hal qilish yetarli emas; biz inqirozning asl sababini tizimli ravishda yo'q qilishimiz kerak.

definition: at any time

sentence.en: The integration of artificial intelligence is transforming the healthcare industry faster than ever before. [cite: 107]
sentence.uz: Sun'iy intellektning integratsiyasi sog'liqni saqlash sohasini har qachongidan (qachondir) ham tezroq o'zgartirmoqda.

definition: a thing characteristic of its kind or illustrating a general rule

sentence.en: The sudden collapse of the major bank serves as a stark example of inadequate regulatory oversight. [cite: 109]
sentence.uz: Yirik bankning to'satdan qulashi nazorat qoidalarining yetarli emasligining yaqqol misoli bo'lib xizmat qiladi.

definition: each of a pair of globular organs in the head through which people and vertebrate animals see

sentence.en: With a keen eye for detail, the quality assurance tester identified the subtle UI inconsistency. [cite: 111]
sentence.uz: Tafsilotlarga o'tkir ko'z bilan qaraydigan sifat nazorati sinovchisi UI (foydalanuvchi interfeysi) dagi nozik nomuvofiqlikni aniqladi.

definition: the front part of a person's head from the forehead to the chin

sentence.en: Global economies now face the daunting challenge of recovering from an unprecedented financial recession. [cite: 113]
sentence.uz: Hozirda global iqtisodiyotlar misli ko'rilmagan moliyaviy tanazzuldan qutulishdek qiyin vazifaga yuz tutmoqdalar.

definition: a group of one or more parents and their children living together as a unit

sentence.en: The socio-economic stability of the nuclear family is deeply interconnected with overarching governmental policies. [cite: 117]
sentence.uz: Yadroviy oilaning ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy barqarorligi hukumatning umumiy siyosati bilan chuqur o'zaro bog'liqdir.

definition: at, to, or by a great distance (used to indicate the extent to which one thing is distant from another)

sentence.en: The implications of widespread automation reach far beyond simple blue-collar job displacement. [cite: 118]
sentence.uz: Keng tarqalgan avtomatlashtirishning oqibatlari oddiy jismoniy mehnat joylarini almashtirishdan ancha uzoqqa yetib boradi.

definition: a man in relation to his natural child or children

sentence.en: The founding father of modern computer science laid the theoretical groundwork for artificial intelligence. [cite: 119]
sentence.uz: Zamonaviy kompyuter fanining asoschi otasi sun'iy intellekt uchun nazariy zamin yaratdi.

definition: experience (an emotion or sensation)

sentence.en: Designing intuitive user interfaces ensures that clients feel completely comfortable navigating complex applications. [cite: 121]
sentence.uz: Intuitiv foydalanuvchi interfeyslarini loyihalash mijozlarning murakkab ilovalarda harakatlanishda o'zlarini butunlay qulay his qilishlarini ta'minlaydi.

definition: plural of foot

sentence.en: The newly constructed skyscraper stands thousands of feet above the bustling urban landscape. [cite: 124]
sentence.uz: Yangi qurilgan osmono'par bino gavjum shahar manzarasi ustidan minglab fut (oyoqlar) balandlikda qad ko'tarib turadi.

definition: combustion or burning, in which substances combine chemically with oxygen from the air and typically give out bright light, heat, and smoke

sentence.en: The devastating forest fire underscored the urgent necessity for proactive environmental management protocols. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Dahshatli o'rmon yong'ini (olovi) atrof-muhitni faol boshqarish protokollarining tezkor zaruratini ta'kidladi.

definition: of a color at the end of the spectrum next to orange and opposite violet

sentence.en: The system dashboard displays a flashing red indicator whenever a critical server malfunction occurs. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Kritik server nosozligi yuz berganda, tizim boshqaruv panelida yonib-o'chuvchi qizil indikator ko'rsatiladi.

definition: a limbless cold-blooded vertebrate animal with gills and fins and living wholly in water

sentence.en: Over-exploitation of international waters has driven numerous fish species to the brink of extinction. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Xalqaro suvlardan ortiqcha foydalanish ko'plab baliq turlarini yo'q bo'lib ketish yoqasiga olib keldi.

definition: have in or be able to bring to one's mind an awareness of

sentence.en: It is crucial to always remember that robust cybersecurity requires constant vigilance and proactive patching. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Mustahkam kiberxavfsizlik doimiy hushyorlik va faol yamoqlar (yangilanishlar) talab qilishini doimo eslab qolish juda muhimdir.

definition: equivalent to the sum of two and three

sentence.en: The comprehensive strategic plan outlines five primary objectives for achieving sustainable corporate growth. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Keng qamrovli strategik reja barqaror korporativ o'sishga erishish uchun beshta asosiy maqsadni belgilab beradi.

definition: cease work or movement in order to relax, refresh oneself, or recover strength

sentence.en: After completing the exhaustive deployment sequence, the engineering team finally took a well-deserved rest. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Charchatuvchi joylashtirish ketma-ketligini tugatgandan so'ng, muhandislar jamoasi nihoyat munosib dam oldilar.

definition: any nutritious substance that people or animals eat or drink

sentence.en: Ensuring global food security amidst a rapidly changing climate requires revolutionary agricultural innovations. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Tez o'zgarib borayotgan iqlim sharoitida global oziq-ovqat xavfsizligini ta'minlash inqilobiy qishloq xo'jaligi innovatsiyalarini talab qiladi.

definition: space that can be occupied or where something can be done

sentence.en: There is absolutely no room for error when calculating the trajectory of an orbital spacecraft. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Orbital kosmik kemaning trayektoriyasini hisoblashda xato qilish uchun mutlaqo joy (xona) yo'q.

definition: the visible shape or configuration of something

sentence.en: Developing a secure authentication form is a fundamental requirement for any modern web application. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Xavfsiz autentifikatsiya shaklini (formasini) ishlab chiqish har qanday zamonaviy veb-ilova uchun asosiy talabdir.

definition: move at a speed faster than a walk

sentence.en: To effectively run a large-scale enterprise, executives must seamlessly delegate responsibilities across departments. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Keng ko'lamli korxonani samarali boshqarish (yurgizish) uchun rahbarlar bo'limlar bo'ylab majburiyatlarni muammosiz topshirishlari kerak.

definition: equivalent to the product of two and two

sentence.en: The complex algorithmic puzzle can primarily be solved using one of four distinct mathematical approaches. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Murakkab algoritmik boshqotirmani asosan to'rtta alohida matematik yondashuvdan biri yordamida hal qilish mumkin.

definition: an institution for educating children

sentence.en: A progressive school curriculum should prioritize critical thinking and adaptability over rote memorization. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Ilg'or maktab o'quv dasturi quruq yodlashdan ko'ra tanqidiy fikrlash va moslashuvchanlikni birinchi o'ringa qo'yishi kerak.

definition: the side or part of an object that presents itself to view or that is normally seen or used first

sentence.en: The revolutionary tech company is currently at the forefront of developing fully autonomous vehicles. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Inqilobiy texnologiya kompaniyasi hozirda to'liq avtonom transport vositalarini ishlab chiqishning eng oldida (old qismida) turibdi.

definition: the expanse of salt water that covers most of the earth's surface

sentence.en: Rising sea levels pose an existential threat to heavily populated coastal metropolitan regions globally. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Dengiz sathining ko'tarilishi butun dunyo bo'ylab aholi zich joylashgan qirg'oq bo'yidagi metropoliten mintaqalariga jiddiy tahdid solmoqda.

definition: past tense of give

sentence.en: The anonymous philanthropist gave a massive financial endowment to the leading cancer research institute. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Anonim xayriyachi yetakchi saraton kasalligini o'rganish institutiga katta miqdorda moliyaviy yordam berdi.

definition: constituting number two in a sequence; coming after the first in time or order

sentence.en: Optimizing the application's load time by just one second can drastically improve overall user retention. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Ilovaning yuklanish vaqtini atigi bir soniyaga optimallashtirish foydalanuvchilarning umumiy saqlanishini keskin yaxshilashi mumkin.

definition: specified or stated; past participle of give

sentence.en: Given the current economic volatility, conservative fiscal strategies are highly recommended by leading analysts. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Hozirgi iqtisodiy o'zgaruvchanlikni hisobga olgan holda (berilgan), yetakchi tahlilchilar tomonidan konservativ fiskal strategiyalar qat'iy tavsiya etiladi.

definition: past participle of see

sentence.en: We have seen a remarkable paradigm shift in how consumers interact with decentralized digital currencies. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Biz iste'molchilarning markazlashmagan raqamli valyutalar bilan qanday munosabatda bo'lishida ajoyib paradigma o'zgarishini ko'rdik.

definition: past tense and past participle of get

sentence.en: The ambitious startup got a massive injection of venture capital after demonstrating their revolutionary prototype. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Shuhratparast startap o'zlarining inqilobiy prototipini namoyish etgandan so'ng katta hajmdagi venchur kapitaliga ega bo'ldi (oldi).

definition: a set of words that is complete in itself, typically containing a subject and predicate

sentence.en: Crafting a perfectly structured academic sentence requires a deep understanding of grammatical nuances and varied vocabulary. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Mukammal tuzilgan akademik gap yaratish grammatik nuanslar va turli xil lug'atni chuqur tushunishni talab qiladi.

definition: of the color between blue and yellow in the spectrum

sentence.en: Transitioning towards green energy alternatives is no longer an option, but an absolute global necessity. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Yashil energiya muqobillariga o'tish endi tanlov emas, balki mutlaq global zaruratdir.

definition: more than two but not many

sentence.en: The sophisticated cyberattack successfully bypassed several layers of advanced institutional network security. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Murakkab kiberhujum ilg'or institutsional tarmoq xavfsizligining bir necha qatlamlarini muvaffaqiyatli aylanib o'tdi.

definition: measuring a small distance from end to end

sentence.en: Despite its exceedingly short duration, the intense earthquake caused catastrophic structural damage to the city. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: O'ta qisqa davom etishiga qaramay, kuchli zilzila shaharga halokatli tuzilmaviy zarar yetkazdi.

definition: past participle of show

sentence.en: Empirical studies have consistently shown a strong correlation between early childhood education and lifelong success. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Empirik tadqiqotlar erta yoshdagi bolalar ta'limi va umrbod muvaffaqiyat o'rtasidagi kuchli bog'liqlikni doimiy ravishda ko'rsatmoqda.

definition: in the intervening period between (the time mentioned) and the time under consideration

sentence.en: The technological landscape has evolved exponentially since the initial introduction of the ubiquitous smartphone. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Keng tarqalgan smartfonning dastlabki joriy etilishidan beri texnologik manzara eksponensial ravishda rivojlandi.

definition: equivalent to the product of two and three

sentence.en: The highly anticipated software update will be officially released across all major platforms in exactly six days. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Uzoq kutilgan dasturiy ta'minot yangilanishi barcha yirik platformalarda aynan olti kundan keyin rasman chiqariladi.

definition: move along a smooth surface while maintaining continuous contact with it

sentence.en: The presenter used a meticulously designed slide to visually articulate the complex macroeconomic forecasting model. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Taqdimotchi murakkab makroiqtisodiy prognozlash modelini vizual tarzda ifodalash uchun sinchkovlik bilan ishlab chiqilgan slayddan (sirpanishdan) foydalangan.

definition: at some unspecified or unknown time

sentence.en: The committee agreed to reconvene sometime next quarter to thoroughly evaluate the project's ongoing progress. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Qo'mita loyihaning davom etayotgan jarayonini har tomonlama baholash uchun kelasi chorakda qachondir qayta yig'ilishga rozi bo'ldi.

definition: in or after a short time

sentence.en: Unless immediate action is taken, the endangered species will soon be entirely eradicated from its natural habitat. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Agar zudlik bilan choralar ko'rilmasa, yo'qolib ketish xavfi ostida turgan turlar tez orada o'zining tabiiy yashash joylaridan butunlay qirilib ketadi.

definition: a continuous area or expanse which is free, available, or unoccupied

sentence.en: The exploration of deep space continually challenges our fundamental understanding of advanced astrophysics. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Chuqur kosmosni (bo'shliqni) o'rganish ilg'or astrofizika haqidagi asosiy tushunchalarimizni doimiy ravishda sinovdan o'tkazadi.

definition: a nation or territory considered as an organized political community under one government

sentence.en: The treaty requires all participating States to unconditionally surrender their stockpiles of biological weapons. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Shartnoma barcha ishtirokchi davlatlardan (shtatlardan) biologik qurollar zaxiralarini so'zsiz topshirishni talab qiladi.

definition: an account of imaginary or real people and events told for entertainment

sentence.en: The compelling story of the entrepreneur’s arduous journey serves as an inspiration to aspiring innovators worldwide. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Tadbirkorning mashaqqatli sayohati haqidagi jozibali hikoya butun dunyo bo'ylab intiluvchan innovatorlar uchun ilhom manbai bo'lib xizmat qiladi.

definition: the star around which the earth orbits

sentence.en: Harnessing the immense energy emitted by the sun is central to reducing our dependence on fossil fuels. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Quyosh chiqaradigan ulkan energiyadan foydalanish qazib olinadigan yoqilg'ilarga qaramligimizni kamaytirishda muhim ahamiyatga ega.

definition: confident in what one thinks or knows; having no doubt

sentence.en: Rigorous quality assurance protocols ensure that developers are absolutely sure the software is bug-free before launch. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Qat'iy sifat nazorati protokollari dasturchilar ishga tushirishdan oldin dasturiy ta'minotning xatosiz ekanligiga mutlaqo ishonch hosil qilishlarini (ishonchli) ta'minlaydi.

definition: a piece of furniture with a flat top and one or more legs

sentence.en: The lead negotiator brought a highly controversial, yet necessary, proposal to the diplomatic bargaining table. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Bosh muzokarachi diplomatik savdolashuv stoliga o'ta bahsli, ammo zarur taklifni olib keldi.

definition: despite the fact that; although

sentence.en: Even though the algorithm is highly complex, its modular architecture makes it remarkably easy to maintain. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Garchi algoritm o'ta murakkab bo'lsa-da, uning modulli arxitekturasi uni qo'llab-quvvatlashni ajoyib darajada osonlashtiradi.

definition: on or in the course of this present day

sentence.en: The interconnected digital economy of today demands unprecedented levels of robust international cybersecurity cooperation. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Bugungi kundagi o'zaro bog'liq raqamli iqtisodiyot misli ko'rilmagan darajadagi mustahkam xalqaro kiberxavfsizlik hamkorligini talab qiladi.

definition: past tense and past participle of tell

sentence.en: The chief executive explicitly told the board of directors that further budget cuts would be severely detrimental. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Bosh ijrochi direktor direktorlar kengashiga byudjetni yanada qisqartirish jiddiy zarar yetkazishini aniq aytdi.

definition: past tense of take

sentence.en: The monumental engineering project took nearly a decade of relentless effort to finally complete. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Ushbu ulkan muhandislik loyihasini nihoyat yakunlash uchun qariyb o'n yillik tinimsiz harakat kerak bo'ldi (oldi).

definition: the highest or uppermost point, part, or surface of something

sentence.en: Achieving top tier performance in mobile application development requires deep knowledge of memory management. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Mobil ilovalarni ishlab chiqishda yuqori (eng tepa) darajadagi unumdorlikka erishish xotirani boshqarish bo'yicha chuqur bilimlarni talab qiladi.

definition: in the direction of

sentence.en: Society is rapidly moving toward an era where artificial intelligence manages routine administrative tasks. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Jamiyat sun'iy intellekt muntazam ma'muriy vazifalarni boshqaradigan davrga qarab tezkorlik bilan harakatlanmoqda.

definition: a woody perennial plant, typically having a single stem or trunk growing to a considerable height

sentence.en: A robust binary search tree is fundamentally critical for optimizing high-speed database retrieval operations. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Mustahkam ikkilik qidiruv daraxti ma'lumotlar bazasini yuqori tezlikda qidirish operatsiyalarini optimallashtirish uchun mutlaqo muhimdir.

definition: make an attempt or effort to do something

sentence.en: Innovative software engineers constantly try to push the perceived boundaries of modern computational capabilities. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Innovatsion dasturiy ta'minot muhandislari doimo zamonaviy hisoblash imkoniyatlarining qabul qilingan chegaralarini kengaytirishga harakat qilishadi.

definition: move or cause to move in a circular direction wholly or partly around an axis or point

sentence.en: The sudden downturn in the stock market caused many nervous investors to frantically turn to safer assets. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Fond bozoridagi to'satdan pasayish ko'plab asabiy sarmoyadorlarning xavfsizroq aktivlarga vahima bilan burilishiga (o'tishiga) sabab bo'ldi.

definition: joined together politically, for a common purpose, or by common feelings

sentence.en: The newly forged alliance ensures that the participating nations remain united against external economic pressures. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Yangi tuzilgan ittifoq ishtirokchi davlatlarning tashqi iqtisodiy bosimlarga qarshi birlashgan holda qolishini ta'minlaydi.

definition: up to (the point in time or the event mentioned)

sentence.en: The heavily encrypted digital archives will remain entirely inaccessible until the strictly specified date arrives. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Qattiq shifrlangan raqamli arxivlar qat'iy belgilangan sana kelguniga qadar butunlay yetishib bo'lmas bo'lib qoladi.

definition: more formal term for on, especially in abstract senses

sentence.en: The entire architectural integrity of the application rests upon a highly scalable and fault-tolerant microservices framework. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Ilovaning butun me'moriy yaxlitligi yuqori darajada kengaytiriladigan va xatolarga chidamli mikroservislar tizimiga (ustiga) tayanadi.

definition: present participle of use

sentence.en: Automating repetitive quality assurance tasks using advanced testing frameworks drastically accelerates the development lifecycle. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Ilg'or test tizimlaridan foydalangan holda takrorlanadigan sifat nazorati vazifalarini avtomatlashtirish rivojlanish davrini keskin tezlashtiradi.

definition: under normal conditions; generally

sentence.en: Highly efficient backend systems usually rely on asynchronous processing to manage concurrent data streams effectively. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Yuqori samarali backend tizimlari parallel ma'lumotlar oqimini samarali boshqarish uchun odatda asinxron ishlov berishga tayanadi.

definition: of the color of milk or fresh snow

sentence.en: The pristine white aesthetic of the user interface was deliberately chosen to evoke a sense of minimalist professionalism. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Foydalanuvchi interfeysining musaffo oq estetikasi minimalist professionallik hissini uyg'otish uchun ataylab tanlangan.

definition: all of; entire

sentence.en: A holistic approach to software engineering considers the whole ecosystem rather than just isolated individual components. [cite: 126]
sentence.uz: Dasturiy injiniringga yaxlit yondashuv shunchaki ajratilgan alohida komponentlarni emas, balki butun ekotizimni ko'rib chiqadi.
